name: hyperwave-wallet
description: HyperWave wallet interface: the abstract Wallet base class — the pluggable payment interface a concrete wallet implements and the engine composes over. No dependencies.
author: Mokhtar Naamani <mokhtar.naamani@gmail.com>

scripts.lint:jsdoc: tsc --noEmit --allowJs --checkJs --strict --skipLibCheck --maxNodeModuleJsDepth 0 --target es2022 lib/wallet.js 2>&1 | grep -E 'error TS80' ; test $? -eq 1
